claim: Code-based tool orchestration (agents writing code to call tools) scales exponentially vs sequential tool calling, which scales linearly—code gives agents human-like iteration patterns.
actionable: Design agents to execute code that orchestrates tools rather than making sequential tool calls; this scales agent capability exponentially with tool complexity.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Building with the Claude Agent SDK

claim: Memory systems (file-based context) unlock longer agent trajectories; Claude Sonnet 4.5 can work on complex tasks for 30+ hours vs 7 hours in previous generations.
actionable: Implement persistent memory files for agents; expect 4-5x improvement in task completion time through memory-based context management.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Building with the Claude Agent SDK

claim: Agents need explicit mechanisms to see results of their actions (screenshots, visual feedback) and self-correct; without this feedback loop, agents make persistent errors.
actionable: Build agents with computer use / visual feedback capabilities; implement explicit error detection loops so agents can observe consequences and adjust.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Building with the Claude Agent SDK

claim: Claude Sonnet 4.5 excels at code generation and autonomous software engineering; coding capability translates to superior performance across diverse agent domains.
actionable: Use Claude Sonnet 4.5 for coding-heavy agents; coding strength generalizes to planning, reasoning, and multi-step task decomposition.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Building with the Claude Agent SDK

claim: MCP (Model Context Protocol) connectors allow agents to use MCP servers without building explicit clients; declare server usage in a message and the API handles it.
actionable: Use MCP connectors to quickly integrate domain knowledge and tools into agents without engineering custom client code.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Building with the Claude Agent SDK

claim: File API lets multiple agent conversations reference the same uploaded files; code execution tool lets agents analyze data and generate outputs (CSV, presentations, visualizations).
actionable: Use File API for persistent context across conversations; pair with code execution for data analysis and artifact generation.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Building with the Claude Agent SDK

claim: Prompt caching skips redundant token processing by resuming from cached context in similar conversation chains, saving both time and money.
actionable: Use prompt caching for repetitive agent tasks with shared context; implement caching for long system prompts and shared knowledge bases.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Building with the Claude Agent SDK

claim: The Claude Agent SDK provides the same infrastructure used in Claude Code and Claude AI; building on it means competing on product differentiation, not basic agent scaffolding.
actionable: Use Claude Agent SDK to leverage Anthropic's internal tooling; focus product development on domain workflows and UX rather than rebuilding agent infrastructure.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Building with the Claude Agent SDK

claim: Distinguish workflows (predefined paths) from agents (autonomous loops); agents let models decide optimal path; workflows follow deterministic execution.
actionable: Use workflows for constrained business processes with known paths; use agents when model autonomy and adaptation add value.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Building with the Claude Agent SDK

claim: Skills (reusable domain expertise files) give agents procedural knowledge; agents can learn to write their own skills after completing tasks once.
actionable: Build skill libraries documenting organizational best practices; let agents reference and generate skills for future automation.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Building with the Claude Agent SDK

claim: Successful AI startups (Cursor, Windsurf, Lovable) built on weak early models; they're now dominant because they built infrastructure for frontier models to leverage.
actionable: Build AI product infrastructure now even with current models; design for easy model upgrades so you benefit exponentially as models improve.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Building with the Claude Agent SDK
